# Regex Pattern Definitions {-#regex-pattern-def .unlisted}

:::{.comment}
Congrats! You found a hidden page.
:::

`[^$]\$[^$]`{id="inline-math-reg"}

: **inline math |** match any occurrence of a dollar sign sandwiched between two non-dollar-sign characters; less helpful in documents with monetary values [⏎](#reg-ex-table)


`[^\$]\$[^(\r?\n|\$)]+\$[^\$]`{id="inline-math-reg-alt"}

: **inline math alternate |** match one or more occurrences of any non-linebreaking or dollar-sign characters when sandwiched between two dollar signs [⏎](#reg-ex-table)


`^\$\$`{id="display-math-reg"}

: **display math |** match any set of doubled dollar signs, when it occurs at the start of a line [⏎](#reg-ex-table)


`\$\$.+\$\$`{id="display-math-reg-alt"}

: **display math alternate |** match any number of non-linebreaking characters when sandwiched between a set of doubled dollar signs [⏎](#reg-ex-table)


`^#+ [*^\S]`{id="heading-reg"}

: **headings |** match any number of pound signs at the start of a line when followed by a single space then one non-whitespace character [⏎](#reg-ex-table)


`!\[`{id="figure-reg"}

: **figure |** match an exclamation point followed by a left bracket [⏎](#reg-ex-table)
